query: SELECT id, question, answer, area FROM flashcards WHERE (question, answer) IN (SELECT question, answer FROM flashcards GROUP BY question, answer HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY question, answer, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ogs2UohtmxebP6.root --database ijHg8DNNEmRjrxapNo7pAg --execute SELECT id, question, answer, area FROM flashcards WHERE (question, answer) IN (SELECT question, answer FROM flashcards GROUP BY question, answer HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY question, answer, id;

rows.question: Rm 6.4
rows.answer: De sorte que fomos sepultados com ele pelo batismo na morte; para que, como Cristo ressuscitou dos mortos pela glória do Pai, assim andemos nós também em novidade de vida.
